product_overview: Tendar is a multi-tenant web platform for F&B businesses that provides a digital menu, online ordering, and admin tools to manage orders and storefronts. It enables shop owners to self-register a tenant, let customers order online, and let staff manage incoming orders in real time.
core_goals: Allow a business owner to create a new tenant (store) with a unique URL and credentials
Enable customers to browse a store's digital menu and place orders quickly from any device
Provide store staff with a simple interface to view and update incoming orders
Let customers create and sign in to accounts for order history and profile management

features.name: Global Tenant Registration
features.description: Allow new merchants to create a store (tenant) by choosing a store name and slug and registering with email/password so they can manage their storefront.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill store name -> Fill desired store slug -> Fill admin email -> Fill password -> Submit registration form -> See success confirmation and access instructions for the new store
Navigate to /register -> Submit with missing required field -> See validation error for the missing field -> Fill the missing field -> Submit registration form -> See success confirmation

features.name: Customer Authentication (Store-scoped)
features.description: Allow customers to create an account or sign in within a specific store context using email and password to enable order history and profile management.
user_flows: Open the tenant's customer auth page -> Choose Login tab -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit -> See success toast and get redirected to the tenant menu
Open the tenant's customer auth page -> Choose Register tab -> Fill name -> Fill valid email -> Fill password -> Submit -> See success toast and get redirected to the tenant menu

Open the tenant's customer auth page -> Choose Register tab -> Fill invalid email -> Submit -> See validation error -> Correct the email -> Submit -> See success toast and get redirected to the tenant menu

features.name: Store Menu & Ordering (Customer)
features.description: Customers can browse a tenant's menu, add items to a cart, add optional table number or notes, and submit an order for the kitchen/cashier to receive.
user_flows: Open the tenant's public menu -> Navigate through categories -> Add a product to cart -> Open cart -> Modify item quantities -> Add table number or order note -> Submit order -> See order confirmation
Open the tenant's public menu -> Add several products to cart -> Open cart -> Remove an item -> Modify quantities -> Submit order -> See order confirmation
Open the tenant's public menu -> Attempt to submit with an empty cart -> See validation message indicating cart is empty -> Add a product to cart -> Submit order -> See order confirmation

features.name: Order Management (Staff/Admin)
features.description: Staff and store admins can view incoming orders in real time, change order statuses as they are prepared/completed, and filter orders by status for operational clarity.
user_flows: Sign in as store admin/staff -> Open the admin orders dashboard -> View list of active orders -> Change an order status from pending to preparing -> Change the order status to completed -> Filter orders by status to verify completed orders
Sign in as store admin/staff -> Open the admin orders dashboard -> Use status filters to find only pending orders -> Select a pending order -> Update status to preparing -> Update status to completed

routes.description: Global landing page for the platform
Customer facing menu page for a specific tenant
Customer login and registration page for a specific tenant
Customer's active and past orders page
Admin/staff order history and completed transactions
Admin QR code and link sharing page
Point of sale system for staff/admin point of entry

features.name: Global Tenant Registration
features.description: New tenants can create their store with a slug, email/password or Google OAuth.
user_interactions: Fill email and password inputs or click Google OAuth
Fill store name and slug fields

features.name: Customer Authentication
features.description: Login, Register, Forgot Password for a customer in a specific store context.
user_interactions: See success toast and get redirected

features.name: Store Menu & Ordering
features.description: Customer browes products, adds them to cart, and checks out.
user_interactions: Click product to add to cart
Add table number or note and submit order

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Staff view incoming orders and update their statuses to completed.
user_interactions: Click to change order status (e.g. Preparing -> Done)

features.name: POS System
features.description: Staff can input orders manually for walk-in customers.
user_interactions: Select products and variants to add to internal POS cart
Add customer name and payment type
Process checkout to insert order directly as completed/paid
